name: network-firewall
title: OCI Firewall — OCI Network Firewall
summary: Creates an OCI Network Firewall (Palo Alto-backed) with a policy composed of address lists, service lists, and ALLOW/DROP/REJECT/INSPECT security rules, plus the firewall instance in a dedicated subnet.

governance.name: prefix
governance.description: Short organization or project prefix. First token of every resource name: {prefix}-{cloud}-{environment}-{resource-type}-{suffix}.

governance.name: environment
governance.description: Deployment environment identifier (e.g., dev, test, prod). Used in resource names and mandatory freeform tags.

governance.name: owner
governance.description: Team or individual that owns the deployed resources. Applied as the mandatory 'owner' freeform tag.

governance.name: cost_center
governance.description: Cost center code for chargeback/showback. Applied as the mandatory 'cost_center' freeform tag.

governance.name: additional_tags
governance.description: Optional additional freeform tags merged beneath the mandatory tag set. Mandatory tags win on key collision.

governance.name: name_suffix
governance.description: Final token of every resource name, used to disambiguate multiple instances of this module.

module.name: compartment_id
module.description: OCID of the compartment for the firewall and policy.

module.name: firewall_subnet_id
module.description: OCID of the subnet hosting the firewall endpoint (dedicated subnet recommended). Supplied by OCID — no framework dependency is implied.

module.name: availability_domain
module.description: Availability domain for the firewall instance. Null lets OCI choose (regional subnet).

module.name: ipv4_address
module.description: Static private IP for the firewall in its subnet. Null = auto-assigned. Route traffic to this IP (or the auto-assigned one) via VCN route rules.

module.name: address_lists
module.description: Named IP address lists (CIDRs) referenced by security rules.

module.name: service_lists
module.type: map(map(object({ protocol = string min_port = number max_port = optional(number) })))
module.description: Named service lists: outer key = service-list name, inner key = service name with protocol and port range.

module.name: security_rules
module.type: map(object({ position_order = number action = string source_address_lists = optional(list(string), []) destination_address_lists = optional(list(string), []) service_lists = optional(list(string), []) }))
module.description: Security rules keyed by logical name, referencing address and service lists by name. Default disposition for unmatched traffic is DROP.

outputs.name: firewall_ids
outputs.description: Map with single key 'firewall' to the OCI Network Firewall OCID.

outputs.name: firewall_private_ip
outputs.description: Private IPv4 address of the firewall — target this in VCN route rules to steer traffic through the firewall.

outputs.name: policy_id
outputs.description: OCID of the network firewall policy.

outputs.name: rule_ids
outputs.description: Map of logical rule name to security rule name within the policy (rules are policy-scoped, not standalone OCIDs).
